hooks.command: if [ ! -f CLAUDE.md ] && ([ -f package.json ] || [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f go.mod ] || [ -f Cargo.toml ] || [ -f pom.xml ]); then echo 'Tip: This project has no AI dev setup. Run /scaffold to generate CLAUDE.md, agents, skills, rules, and MCP configs tailored to this codebase. Or run /scaffold discover for a full machine-wide AI setup.' >&2; fi; exit 0

MISSING=''; command -v rg >/dev/null 2>&1 || MISSING="$MISSING ripgrep"; command -v fd >/dev/null 2>&1 || MISSING="$MISSING fd"; command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || MISSING="$MISSING jq"; [ -n "$MISSING" ] && echo "Tip: Missing CLI tools that speed up AI agents:$MISSING. Run /scaffold-toolbox to install." >&2; exit 0

if [ -f $HOME/.cortex/last-scaffold-score.txt ]; then SCORE=$(grep -o '[0-9]\+' $HOME/.cortex/last-scaffold-score.txt 2>/dev/null | head -1); SCORE=${SCORE:-100}; if [ "$SCORE" -lt 70 ] 2>/dev/null; then echo 'Cortex: Last scaffold scored '$SCORE'/100. Run /scaffold optimize auto-improve for autonomous improvement.' >&2; fi; fi; exit 0
